name: Obligations mapped to controls (every control has clauseRefs)
summary: Every control declares a non-empty clauseRefs array, and every entry resolves to a clause that exists in the same framework's clauses list.
requirements: Every entry in Control.clauseRefs exists in framework.clauses (no dangling references).
Control.riskLevel is one of: prohibited, high, limited, minimal, gpai.
Control metadata (controlRef, title, description, category) is well-formed.
manual_checks: Reviewer spot-checks that the cited clause text actually justifies the control.
